title: golden carrotXstardew valley coffee
description: This rescource pack changes the golden carrot texture in the cozy cup of coffee from stardew valley.
body:
[![kinetic hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3e5234712d32562be999b307b425ca6286f4b8e_0.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1433)
This rescource pack is based on the cup of coffee from stardew valley. It changes the texture of the golden carrot to the coffee texture from stardew. 

if there are any problems or if you have any suggestions then please report them in the discord so i can fix them!
